## RFC Information

- **RFC Number**: NNNN
- **RFC Title**: [Title]
- **RFC Link**: [Link to RFC document]
- **Target Release**: [Version]

## Implementation Overview

Brief description of what needs to be implemented based on the RFC.

## Implementation Checklist

### Phase 1: Core Infrastructure

- [ ] Task 1
- [ ] Task 2
- [ ] Task 3

### Phase 2: Feature Implementation

- [ ] Task 1
- [ ] Task 2
- [ ] Task 3

### Phase 3: Testing and Documentation

- [ ] Unit tests (>90% coverage)
- [ ] Integration tests
- [ ] Documentation updates
- [ ] Examples and guides

## Success Criteria

From the RFC, the implementation is successful when:

- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] Criterion 3

## Implementation Notes

Any deviations from the RFC or important implementation decisions should be documented here.

## Related Issues/PRs

- [ ] #issue-number: Description
- [ ] #pr-number: Description

## Testing Plan

Describe how the implementation will be tested:

- Unit testing approach
- Integration testing approach
- User acceptance testing
- Performance testing (if applicable)

## Documentation Plan

- [ ] API documentation
- [ ] User guides
- [ ] Migration guides (if applicable)
- [ ] Examples and tutorials

## Rollout Plan

Describe how the feature will be rolled out:

- Feature flags (if applicable)
- Gradual rollout strategy
- Monitoring and metrics
- Rollback plan

## Definition of Done

- [ ] All implementation tasks completed
- [ ] Tests passing with required coverage
- [ ] Documentation complete
- [ ] Code review approved
- [ ] Performance benchmarks met (if applicable)
- [ ] Accessibility requirements met
- [ ] Internationalization complete (if applicable)
- [ ] RFC status updated to "Implemented"
